---
title: "Publications"
---

# Overview of publications based on data available through the PEH platform


This page provides an overview of peer-reviewed publications that made use of data
available through the PEH Data Platform.

<!-- ## HBM4EU AS studies -->


<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- library(readxl) -->
<!-- library(dplyr) -->
<!-- library(knitr) -->

<!-- url <- "https://hbm.vito.be/sites/hbm4eu/files/inline_ckeditor_uploads/Overview%20of%20approved%20requests%20and%20resulting%20publications_01102025.xlsx" -->


<!-- publ_hbm4eu_as <- read_excel(url, sheet = "All publications_HBM4EU AS") -->

<!-- publ_hbm4eu_as |>  -->
<!--   knitr::kable() -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## HBM4EU MOM-study -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- library(readxl) -->
<!-- library(dplyr) -->
<!-- library(knitr) -->

<!-- url <- "https://hbm.vito.be/sites/hbm4eu/files/inline_ckeditor_uploads/Overview%20of%20approved%20requests%20and%20resulting%20publications_01102025.xlsx" -->
<!-- publ_hbm4eu_mom <- read_excel(url, sheet = "All publications_HBM4EU MoMstud") -->

<!-- publ_hbm4eu_mom |>  -->
<!--   knitr::kable() -->
<!-- ``` -->
